claims.statement: login throws an IllegalStateException if userRepository.findPrimaryUser() returns an empty Optional.
login logs LOGIN_BLOCKED and returns a failure LoginResult when lockedUntil is not null and now is before lockedUntil.
login resets lock state when lockedUntil is not null and now is not before lockedUntil.
login verifies the master password by calling passwordService.matches with the stored password hash, salt, and iterations.
login derives sessionKey using passwordService.deriveEncryptionKey when the password matches.
login resets lock state and logs LOGIN_SUCCESS when the password matches.
login increments failedAttempts by one when the password does not match.
login sets lockedUntil to now.plus(LOCKOUT_DURATION) when failedAttempts is greater than or equal to LOCKOUT_THRESHOLD.
login updates lock state by calling userRepository.updateLockState(failedAttempts, lockedUntil) after a failed login.
login logs LOGIN_FAILURE after a failed login attempt.
login wipes masterPassword in a finally block by calling PasswordService.wipe(masterPassword).

entities.name: login
entities.description: Method that authenticates the user and manages lockout state.

entities.name: failedAttempts
entities.description: Method call used to read the current failed attempt count.

entities.name: findPrimaryUser
entities.description: Method call used to retrieve the primary user.

entities.name: get
entities.description: Method call used to retrieve the value from an Optional.

entities.name: isBefore
entities.description: Method call used to compare instants.

entities.name: isEmpty
entities.description: Method call used to test whether an Optional is empty.

entities.name: log
entities.description: Method call used to write an audit log entry.

entities.name: matches
entities.description: Method that verifies whether a password matches an expected hash.

entities.name: now
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the current instant.

entities.name: resetLockState
entities.description: Method call used to clear failed-attempt and lockout state.

entities.name: updateLockState
entities.description: Method call used to persist failed-attempt and lockout state.

entities.name: wipe
entities.description: Method that overwrites a character array with null characters.

relations.description: login calls findPrimaryUser to load the primary user.
login calls isEmpty to check whether setup exists.
login calls get to retrieve the user record from the Optional.
login calls isBefore to evaluate lockout timing.
login calls matches to verify the master password.
login calls resetLockState when clearing lockout state.
login calls updateLockState after failed authentication.
login calls log for blocked, success, and failure events.
login calls now to obtain the current time.
login calls wipe in the finally block.
